title: Example 2: Skill Creator
description: A three-step walkthrough showing how the skill-creator plugin works — from install to a fully engineered, tested, and shippable SKILL.md file.

parts.title: Install the Plugin
parts.description: A terminal window showing the install command: claude plugin add anthropics/claude-plugins-official skill-creator. Below, a file tree showing two new items added to the project: skill-creator SKILL.md and an eval-templates folder. A caption reads: 'Claude now knows how to build skills.'

parts.title: Describe the Workflow
parts.description: A plain-language input box at the top with example text describing a workflow in natural language. Below it, Claude processes the input using the skill-creator SKILL.md — shown as a document being read — and outputs a structured SKILL.md file card with title, description, inputs, outputs, and numbered steps.

parts.title: Refine and Ship
parts.description: A three-step refinement loop: (1) Run Evals — Claude tests the skill against sample inputs. (2) Identify Gaps — a diff view shows patches applied to the SKILL.md. (3) Re-test — a green checkmark confirms the skill passes. A final label reads: 'Versioned, tested, and ready to ship.'
